user.title: Set up SensoWash
user.description: Found {found} SensoWash device(s) nearby. Select one below, or enter a Bluetooth address manually.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Found SensoWash
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up **{name}** ({address})?

pairing.title: Pair your SensoWash
pairing.description:
**{name}** uses the serial Bluetooth protocol and needs to be paired before it can be controlled.

### How to put your toilet in pairing mode

1. Make sure the toilet is powered on
2. Locate the **Bluetooth pairing button** — on most models this is a small button on the **side panel** of the toilet unit, marked with the Bluetooth symbol (℃). On remote-control models it may be on the remote.
3. **Press and hold the button for 3 seconds** until the indicator flashes
4. The toilet will respond to Home Assistant automatically

You have **{timeout} seconds** from when this screen appeared. If the timer runs out, you can try again on the next screen.

pairing_confirm.title: Pairing successful!
pairing_confirm.description:
**{name}** has been paired. The pairing key has been saved — you won't need to do this again.

Click **Submit** to finish setup.

pairing_failed.title: Pairing timed out
pairing_failed.description:
No response was received from **{name}** within {timeout} seconds. Make sure you pressed the Bluetooth button on the toilet during the countdown.

Would you like to try again?

init.title: SensoWash options
init.description:
Configure options for {address}.

The **pairing key** is only needed for older serial-protocol models. Leave blank for modern GATT devices.

error.invalid_pairing_key: Pairing key must be 4 hex bytes (e.g. 01:23:45:67 or 01234567).
